name: Real Estate
description: Local workflow management for OpenClaw with projects, priorities, agenda views, and recurring tasks

storagePath.label: Storage path
storagePath.help: JSON file used to persist task data locally

defaultProject.label: Default project
defaultProject.help: Applied when new tasks are created without an explicit project

agendaHorizonDays.label: Agenda horizon
agendaHorizonDays.help: How many days ahead the agenda tool should inspect by default

autoArchiveCompletedDays.label: Auto-archive threshold
autoArchiveCompletedDays.help: Completed tasks older than this are hidden from normal views
